rewrite.text:
PROVE ex2 : forall a b : nat, a <= b -> a <= S b
BEGIN
  ASSUME a : nat
  ASSUME b : nat
  ASSUME a <= b
  GOAL: a <= S b
  SINCE a <= b:
    SINCE b < S b:
      SINCE a <= b < S b:
        THEREFORE a <= S b
  CONCLUDE: a <= S b [QED]
END

  ASSUME b : nat
  ASSUME a <= b
  GOAL: a <= S b
  SINCE a <= b:
